description: The Breed Motorcycle Club was a one-percenter motorcycle club founded in Asbury Park, New Jersey in 1965 by Salvatore DeIulio. It engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, and other criminal activities, and was involved in conflicts with the Hells Angels and Pagans. The club disbanded in 2006 after prominent members were indicted on racketeering and drug trafficking charges.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Breed Motorcycle Club was a one-percenter motorcycle club that was formed in Asbury Park , New Jersey in the United States in 1965.
country_links.context: The Breed Motorcycle Club was formed in the United States and had chapters in multiple U.S. states, including New York, Ohio, Pennsylvania, and West Virginia.
